name: Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas - Network Office
eligibility: Open to all jobseekers in Dallas County; income-eligible for WIOA training vouchers
notes: Central network office for Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas. Coordinating hub for Dallas County workforce centers.

name: Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas - Pleasant Grove
address: 8035 East R L Thornton Fwy Suite 324, Dallas, TX 75228
eligibility: Open to all jobseekers; income-eligible for WIOA training vouchers
notes: East Dallas / Pleasant Grove satellite workforce center. Walk-in for general jobseekers.

name: Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas - Redbird
eligibility: Open to all jobseekers; income-eligible for WIOA training vouchers
notes: Southwest Dallas / Redbird satellite workforce center. Walk-in for general jobseekers.

name: Workforce Solutions Greater Dallas - Skyline
address: 12480 Park Central Dr Suite 100, Dallas, TX 75251
eligibility: Open to all jobseekers; income-eligible for WIOA training vouchers
notes: North Dallas / Skyline satellite workforce center. Walk-in for general jobseekers.

name: Dallas Public Library - J. Erik Jonsson Central Library Career Resources
notes: Central library JobLink program. Free computer access, career databases (LearningExpress), and resume help.

name: Dallas Public Library - Pleasant Grove Branch Job Center
notes: East Dallas branch with public computers and JobLink resources.

name: Dallas Public Library - Hampton-Illinois Branch Job Center
notes: Southwest Dallas branch with public computers and JobLink resources.

name: Catholic Charities Dallas
eligibility: Open to all in need; income-eligible for some programs
notes: Comprehensive Catholic Charities serving Dallas, Collin, Ellis, Hunt, Kaufman, Navarro, and Rockwall counties.

name: North Texas Food Bank
eligibility: Open to all households needing food assistance
notes: Regional food bank serving 13 North Texas counties via 500+ partner pantries. Mobile pantry schedule online.

name: Dallas County Health and Human Services
notes: Dallas County's public health and human services department. WIC clinics and immunizations.

name: ChildCareGroup
notes: Texas Rising Star resource center; helps families navigate childcare search and TWC subsidy applications.

name: North Texas 211
eligibility: Open to all North Texas residents
notes: Dial 2-1-1 (24/7) for connection to North Texas community resources. Operated through United Way of Metropolitan Dallas.

name: Legal Aid of NorthWest Texas — Dallas
notes: Free civil legal services for low-income residents of Dallas County and 113 other NW Texas counties.

name: Dallas Volunteer Attorney Program
notes: Joint pro bono project of the Dallas Bar Association and Legal Aid of NorthWest Texas.

name: Dallas Housing Authority
notes: Housing Choice Voucher and public housing for Dallas. Waitlists open periodically — check website.

name: Family Gateway
address: 711 S St Paul St, Dallas, TX 75201
eligibility: Families with children experiencing homelessness in Dallas County
notes: Largest provider of shelter and services to homeless families with children in Dallas County. 24/7 intake.

name: Dallas LIFE
eligibility: Adults and families experiencing homelessness; sober environment
notes: Largest emergency shelter in North Texas. Faith-based, no-cost shelter; sober environment required.
